question.text: ICAI's guidance note (2021) on commodity derivatives accounting covers:

answer.text: Both hedging and speculative commodity derivative transactions for Indian accounting standards compliance

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The ICAI guidance note covers accounting for both hedging and speculative commodity derivative transactions, providing guidance for compliance with Indian Accounting Standards. **The Trap:** Covers both types, not just one. Covers all commodities, not just agricultural. Covers domestic transactions. **Cross-Exam Context:** Accounting standards apply to all derivative transactions. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Following ICAI guidance ensures consistency — auditors will reference this note when reviewing your commodity derivative accounting. Stay updated on any revisions.
